highlights: The AI agent landscape is rapidly evolving with xAI, SkillHarness, and PEAR introducing advancements in autonomous execution, safety, and dynamic multi-agent coordination for enhanced reliability.
Significant model innovations include Sakana AI's Fugu for intelligent LLM orchestration and Google's AMIE achieving human-level performance in complex medical diagnosis.

OpenAI is aggressively expanding its enterprise footprint through new security tool suites, strategic acquisitions like Ona, and major enterprise deployments, while also bolstering practical AI skill development.

agents.title: xAI Launches /goal in Grok Build for Autonomous Coding Tasks
agents.summary: xAI introduced '/goal' in Grok Build, enabling agents to perform long-running, autonomous multi-step coding tasks with built-in verification, enhancing agent reliability and goal completion.

agents.title: SkillHarness: Harnessing Safe Skills for Computer-Use Agents
agents.summary: SkillHarness is a new framework for learning and utilizing safe skills in Computer-Use Agents (CUAs), critically reducing unsafe operations and improving execution stability in dynamic environments.

agents.title: PEAR: Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate
agents.summary: PEAR introduces a permutation-equivariant adaptive routing protocol for multi-agent debate, significantly improving LLM reliability and reducing positional biases by dynamically reconfiguring communication roles across rounds.

models.title: Sakana AI Launches Sakana Fugu: Orchestration Model for Frontier LLMs
models.summary: Sakana AI introduced Fugu, an orchestration model designed to intelligently route tasks across a swappable pool of frontier LLMs, leading to superior performance in coding, reasoning, and agentic benchmarks.

models.title: Google's AMIE Medical AI Matches Physicians in Disease Management
models.summary: New research highlights Google's conversational medical AI, AMIE, demonstrating its capability to match primary care physicians in managing complex health conditions, signaling a significant advancement in healthcare AI.

models.title: GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks
models.summary: GLM-5.2 is announced as a new large language model specifically engineered for long-horizon tasks, providing enhanced capabilities for complex, multi-step operations that require sustained context.

tools.title: Prime Intellect Releases prime-rl 0.6.0 for Trillion-Parameter MoE Models
tools.summary: Prime Intellect launched prime-rl 0.6.0, an open framework for asynchronous reinforcement learning, optimized for training trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models on agentic RL workloads with high efficiency.

tools.title: Cisco AI Introduces FAPO: Pipeline-Aware Prompt Optimization
tools.summary: Cisco Foundation AI open-sourced FAPO (Fully Automated Prompt Optimization), a Claude Code-driven system for autonomously optimizing multi-step LLM pipelines from baseline prompts to target accuracy.

tools.title: MoonMath AI Open-Sources HIP Attention Kernel for AMD MI300X
tools.summary: MoonMath AI has open-sourced a HIP attention kernel for AMD MI300X, which significantly outperforms AMD's AITER v3 across various shapes and rounding modes, offering crucial performance gains for developers on AMD hardware.

companies.title: OpenAI Launches Daybreak: AI-Powered Security Tools
companies.summary: OpenAI introduced Daybreak, a suite of new security tools including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, designed to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale, enhancing global cybersecurity.

companies.title: OpenAI to Acquire Ona to Expand Codex and Agent Capabilities
companies.summary: OpenAI announced its plan to acquire Ona, a move intended to expand Codex capabilities with secure, persistent cloud environments, thereby enabling the deployment of long-running AI agents across complex enterprise workflows.

companies.title: Samsung Electronics Adopts ChatGPT and Codex for Employees
companies.summary: Samsung Electronics has deployed ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to its global workforce, marking one of OpenAI's largest enterprise AI rollouts and a significant validation of AI integration in corporate environments.

learning.title: New OpenAI Academy Courses for Practical AI Skills
learning.summary: OpenAI introduced three new Academy courses designed to equip individuals with practical AI skills, foster repeatable workflows, and facilitate the effective application of AI agents in everyday work scenarios.

learning.title: The 7 Types of Agent Memory: A Technical Guide for AI Engineers
learning.summary: This technical guide for AI engineers comprehensively breaks down the 7 types of agent memory, detailing what each stores, where it lives, and when to implement it, which is essential for building robust and intelligent AI agents.

learning.title: Build Real Agentic Apps Using CUGA: Two Dozen Working Examples
learning.summary: Hugging Face and IBM Research offer a practical guide, 'CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness,' for building real agentic applications, accelerating developer adoption with ready-to-use code.
